---
pagetitle: "Teaching · David A. Marinelarena"
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-style: none
section-divs: false
listing:
  - id: teaching-list
    contents: ["*/index.qmd", "*.qmd"]
    exclude:
      filename: index.qmd
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, date, categories, description]
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

::: {.section-label}
// teaching
:::

```{=html}
<p class="page-lede">Courses, workshops, and mentorship.</p>
```

::: {#teaching-list}
:::

::: {.empty-note}
No teaching entries yet.
:::
